code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        if first
          result = "#{current} #{current}"
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{current} #{current}"
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    if first
      result = "#{current} #{current}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{current} #{current}"
    end
  end
  println(result)
end
